sections.sectionTitle: Ezekiel in a Sam leh a Mul Kiat

verses.text: Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, namsau hiam khat la in la, na sam leh na khamul kiatkhia in. Tua ciangin a multe tawi tehin seh thum suah in

Umcihna lim na man ciangin khuapi lim sungah seh khat haltum in. Tua ciangin seh khat la leuleu in la, khuapi kiimah na paikawmin na namsau tawh satnen in. A omlai seh khat pen huihlakah lawn in. Keimah in ka namsau tawh tuate ka sat ding hi
Tua ciangin a multe tawmno khat la in la, na puanmongteep-ah tun in
Tua ciangin na tunsate sung panin tawmcikkhat la leuleu in la, meikuang sungah lawnin kangtumsak in. Tua sung panin mei hong kuangin Israel minam buppi hong lawh ding hi,” a hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Hih Jerusalem khuapi lim en in. Leitung laizangah ka koih a, a kimkotah gamdang khempeuh ka omsak hi

Ahi zongin Jerusalem in ka thupiakna lehdo-in, minam dangte sangin a gilo zaw hong suak a, a kiima om gamdangte sangin a thumanglo zaw hong suak hi. Jerusalem in ka thupiakte nialin, ka thukhamte zui nuamlo hi

Jerusalem aw, tu-in Topa Pasian ahi keima thugente ngai in. Ka thukhamte zuiloin, ka thupiakte ngailo na hih manin na kiima om minam dangte sangin siatna tamzaw na piangsak hi. Minam dangte' gamtat ngeinate na zui hi
Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in nang kong langpan'na thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Minam dang khempeuhte' muhin nang tungah thu kong khen ding hi
Ka deihloh hih nate khempeuh na gamtatna hangin cikmahin ka hih ngei nailoh, cikmah ciangin zong ka hih nawnloh ding thu tawh nang Jerusalem gim kong pia ding hi

Tua kong gimpiakna hangin nang Jerusalem khuapi sungah papite in a tapate' sa ne-in, tapate in a pate uh' sa ne ding uh hi. No a mite gim kong pia ding a, a suaktakha sunsunte nangawn mun khempeuhah kong thehthang gawp ding hi

“Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah a nungta ka hih mah bangin, note in siatna nam khempeuh leh a muhdahhuai gamtatna tawh ka biakinn ninsak na hih manun cikze hetloin note kong sukmang taak kei leh, ci-in ka kiciam hi

Note seh thum suah seh khat pen cina leh gilkialin khuapi sungah na si ding uh hi. Seh thum suah seh khat, khuapi kiimah namsau-in na si ding uh hi. A omlai seh thum suah seh khat ahih leh mun khempeuhah hong thehthangin namsau tawh kong delh ding hi

“Ka lung a kim dongin kong hih ding a, ka hehna leh ka sinsona teng na thuak ding uh hi. Note tungah hih thute hong tun' ciangin, note' cihtaklohna hangin deihsak luatna tawh a hong heh pau ka hihna na phawk ding uh hi
Na kiim uhah a om minamte in note hong muhkhak uh ciangin hong phitsanin hong pelh ding uh hi
Note tungah hehin sinsona tawh gim kong piak ciangin na kim uh-a a om minam dangte khempeuh lau ding uh hi. Amaute in note hong muhdah etin hong simmawhbawl ding uh hi
Na annek ding uh hong khaktan sakin note kong puksisak ding hi. Note a hong susia ding gilkialna pen thaltang' kapkhak bangin na na sa velval ding uh hi

Na tate uh a sisak dingin kialpi hong tungsakin, a that dingin gamsate kong paisak ding hi. Natna, gal kidona, leh gal kikapnate in note hong sisak ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi.
